summary.strongest_novel_connection: C2-H1 (FAILED on citation quality but scientific connection most intellectually ambitious)
summary.cleanest_citations: C2-H3 (all 3 GROUNDED claims verified, zero errors)

critic_questions_addressed.Q1_psi2_separation: NO published evidence found. Remains the single most important unverified assumption.
critic_questions_addressed.Q2_monomer_aggregation_gap: Partially addressed by C2-H2 (Cohen k_n framework) but not resolved.
critic_questions_addressed.Q3_D_ratio_for_IDPs: D_fold undefined for IDPs. Acknowledged in C2-H2 counter-evidence but insufficiently prominent.
critic_questions_addressed.Q4_monomer_polymorph_identity: No direct evidence. Seeded aggregation shows conformational compatibility; de novo nucleation undemonstrated.
critic_questions_addressed.Q5_open_system_resource_theory: Not addressed by any surviving hypothesis.
